title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: rquiz provides three types interactive quizzes HTML widgets: quizzes work R Markdown, Quarto documents, HTML presentations (e.g. revealJS), Shiny applications.

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Questions defined named list 3 (4) elements: single-choice, answer single integer. multiple-choice, answer vector integers. quiz mode auto-detected length answer: can validate question checkSingleQuestion() passing quiz function. catches common mistakes like missing fields, --range indices, misspelled element names:
code: myQuestionSC <- list(   question = "Which city hosted the 2024 Summer Olympics?", # the question text   options = c("Berlin", "London", "Paris", "Madrid"),  # answer options   answer = 3,  # index of the correct answer (Paris)   tip = "Think about the Eiffel Tower."  # optional tip text ) myQuestionMC <- list(   question = "Which of the following are prime numbers?",   options = c("2", "4", "7", "9", "11", "15"),   answer = c(1, 3, 5),  # indices of correct options (2, 7, 11)   tip = "Prime numbers are only divisible by 1 and themselves." ) checkSingleQuestion(myQuestionSC)  # returns invisibly if valid  # Common mistake: unnamed or partially named list bad <- list("What is 2+2?", c("3", "4"), answer = 2) checkSingleQuestion(bad) #> Error: The question list must have named elements: 'question', 'options', #>   and 'answer' (plus optionally 'tip'). Missing: question, options. #>   Example: list(question = "What is 2+2?", options = c("3", "4", "5"),  #>   answer = 2) #>   See ?checkSingleQuestion or ?singleQuestion for examples.

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Pass list question lists. question follows structure. Sub-lists can named (e.g. q1, q2) readability, required. Single-choice - questions single correct answer: Mixed tips - questions include custom tip text: Multiple-choice - question multiple correct answers (length(answer) > 1), questions automatically use checkboxes: Validate entire question list checkMultiQuestions():
code: sportQuiz <- list(   q1 = list(     question = "Which city hosted the 2024 Summer Olympics?",     options = c("Athens", "London", "Paris", "Tokyo"),     answer = 3   ),   q2 = list(     question = "Which sport was added to the Olympics at the 2024 Paris Games?",     options = c("Skateboarding", "Breakdance", "Surfing", "Sport Climbing"),     answer = 2   ),   q3 = list(     question = "At the 1900 Olympics in Paris, one sport was featured that has never returned to the Games since. Which one?",     options = c("Live pigeon shooting", "Underwater archery", "Synchronized sneezing",        "Backwards horse vaulting"),     answer = 1   ) ) sportQuizWithTips <- list(   q1 = list(     question = "Which city hosted the 2024 Summer Olympics?",     options = c("Athens", "London", "Paris", "Tokyo"),     answer = 3,     tip = "They speak French there."   ),   q2 = list(     question = "Which sport was added to the Olympics at the 2024 Paris Games?",     options = c("Skateboarding", "Breakdance", "Surfing", "Sport Climbing"),     answer = 2     # no tip for this question - the tip button won't appear here   ) ) scienceQuiz <- list(   q1 = list(     question = "Which of these are noble gases?",     options = c("Helium", "Oxygen", "Neon", "Iron"),     answer = c(1, 3)   ),   q2 = list(     question = "Which planet is closest to the Sun?",     options = c("Venus", "Mercury", "Mars"),     answer = 2  # single correct answer, but rendered as checkbox   ) ) checkMultiQuestions(sportQuiz)  # returns invisibly if valid  # Common mistake: flat list instead of list of lists bad <- list(question = "Q1?", options = c("A", "B"), answer = 1,             question = "Q2?", options = c("C", "D"), answer = 2) checkMultiQuestions(bad) #> Error: `x` looks like a single question, not a list of questions. #>   Wrap it in an outer list: list(q1 = list(question = ..., options = ...,  #>   answer = ...)) #>   See ?checkMultiQuestions or ?multiQuestions for examples.

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text:
Define cloze text $$!answer!$$ markers blank fields. Optionally add distractor options: Normal text wraps automatically across lines. code formatting, use 
 tags — note inside 
, need 
 tags explicit line breaks: Validate checkFillBlanks():
code:
rQuiz <- list( cloze = "R is a $$!programming!$$ language for $$!statistical computing!$$.", addOptions = c("natural", "colloquial", "movies") ) codeQuiz <- list( cloze = "
x $$!<-!$$ c(1, 2, 3) $$!mean!$$(x)
", addOptions = c("=", "->", "median", "sum") ) checkFillBlanks(rQuiz) # returns invisibly if valid # Common mistake: misspelled element name bad <- list(clozed = "R is a $$!programming!$$ language.") checkFillBlanks(bad) #> Error: Unknown element(s) in `x`: 'clozed'. #> Allowed elements are: 'cloze' (required) and 'addOptions' (optional). #> See ?checkFillBlanks or ?fillBlanks for examples.

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: data defined, pass quiz function:
code: myQuestionSC <- list(   question = "Which city hosted the 2024 Summer Olympics?", # the question text   options = c("Berlin", "London", "Paris", "Madrid"),  # answer options   answer = 3,  # index of the correct answer (Paris)   tip = "Think about the Eiffel Tower."  # optional tip text ) singleQuestion(   x = myQuestionSC,   title = "Geography Quiz",   showTipButton = TRUE )

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: three quiz functions share common set parameters:

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Tips: Set showTipButton = TRUE display tip button. behavior depends quiz type mode: Single-choice (singleQuestion multiQuestions): Tips shown provide custom tip text 4th element question list (tip = "..."). Questions without tip simply don’t show button. Multiple-choice: custom tip provided, automatic tip generated showing number correct answers (e.g. “Number correct answers: 3”). can still override tip text. Fill---blank (fillBlanks): tip shows available answer options (correct answers + distractors addOptions). Submit & retry (MC mode singleQuestion): clicking Submit, feedback message shows many correct wrong selections made. Submit button disabled user changes selection (adds removes option), can clicked . allows iterative learning — adjust answer retry without reloading page. Shuffling: Set shuffle = TRUE randomize order: singleQuestion: answer options displayed random order time widget rendered (e.g. page loaded refreshed). multiQuestions: question order randomized render, also time user clicks “Try ” results page.

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: visual aspects customizable — colors, fonts, sizes. Common parameters include: See function documentation (?singleQuestion, ?multiQuestions, ?fillBlanks) full list design parameters.

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: use multiple quizzes document want consistent look, create reusable theme rquizTheme() instead repeating color settings: theme provides defaults overridden explicitly passed arguments: See ?rquizTheme available theme parameters, including quiz-specific ones like optionLabelBg (singleQuestion), navButtonBg (multiQuestions), descriptFontSize (fillBlanks).
code: # Define a dark theme once dark <- rquizTheme(   fontFamily = "Georgia, serif",   fontSize = 18,   titleCol = "#E0E0E0", titleBg = "#1A1A2E",   questionCol = "#FFFFFF", questionBg = "#16213E",   mainCol = "#E0E0E0", mainBg = "#1A1B2E",   optionBg = "#252540",   navButtonCol = "#FFFFFF", navButtonBg = "#E94560",   tipButtonCol = "#E0E0E0", tipButtonBg = "#2C2C3E",   solutionButtonCol = "#E0E0E0", solutionButtonBg = "#2C2C3E" )  # Apply to any quiz - all share the same design: singleQuestion(x = myQuestionSC, theme = dark, title = "Quiz 1") multiQuestions(x = scienceQuiz, theme = dark, title = "Quiz 2") fillBlanks(x = rQuiz, theme = dark, title = "Quiz 3") # Use the dark theme but override the title background: singleQuestion(x = myQuestionSC, theme = dark, title = "Quiz 1",    titleBg = "#FF0000")

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Since quiz content rendered HTML, can use HTML tags format text within questions, options, tips, cloze text. Standard Markdown formatting (*italic*, **bold**) work inside quiz strings — use HTML tags instead.

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Use <em> italics (e.g. species names) <strong> bold:
code: list( question = "What is the scientific name of the blue whale?", options = c( "Balaenoptera musculus", "Megaptera novaeangliae", "Physeter macrocephalus" ), answer = 1 )

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Use <code> inline code formatting:
code: list( question = "What does the pipe operator |> do in R?", options = c( "It performs logical OR operations", "It passes the left side as the first argument to the right side", "It creates a new variable" ), answer = 2 )

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Use <span> inline CSS colored styled text:
code: list( question = "Which color does litmus paper turn in an acidic solution?", options = c("Blue", "Red", "Green", "Yellow"), answer = 2 )

text:
Use 
 tags monospace code blocks fillBlanks(). Inside 
, line breaks require

code:
list( cloze = "
library($$!ggplot2!$$)
 ggplot(data = iris) +
   $$!geom_point!$$(aes(x = Sepal.Length, y = Sepal.Width))
", addOptions = c("geom_line", "dplyr") )

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Set language change UI text (buttons, messages) automatically: Currently supported: English ("en"), German ("de"), French ("fr"), Spanish ("es"). request additional languages, please open issue GitHub.
code: # German singleQuestion(x = myQuestionSC, language = "de")  # French multiQuestions(x = sportQuiz, language = "fr")  # Spanish fillBlanks(x = rQuiz, language = "es")

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Simply include quiz code code chunk. widget renders part HTML output: HTML slide presentations (e.g. revealJS, xaringan), use scroll = TRUE add scrollbar quiz exceeds available slide space:
code: ```{r} library(rquiz) singleQuestion(   x = list(     question = "What is 2+2?",     options = c("3", "4", "5"),     answer = 2   ),   title = "Math" ) ``` singleQuestion(x = myQuestionSC, scroll = TRUE, height = "400px")

title: Creating Quizzes with rquiz
text: Use provided output/render functions: quiz type pair: singleQuestionOutput() / renderSingleQuestion(), multiQuestionsOutput() / renderMultiQuestions(), fillBlanksOutput() / renderFillBlanks().
code: library(shiny) library(rquiz)  ui <- fluidPage(   h2("My Quiz App"),   singleQuestionOutput("quiz") )  server <- function(input, output) {   output$quiz <- renderSingleQuestion({     singleQuestion(       x = list(         question = "What is 2+2?",         options = c("3", "4", "5"),         answer = 2       )     )   }) }  shinyApp(ui, server)

title: Demo Files for Documents and Presentations
text: quiz fits slide depends presentation framework: Slidy: Slides automatically expand fit quiz content, scroll = TRUE usually needed. RevealJS (Quarto): Slides fixed size. can either add {.scrollable} individual slides, enable scrolling globally YAML header, set scroll = TRUE fixed height inside quiz function. frameworks: quiz overflows beyond visible slide area, set scroll = TRUE adjust height fit slide layout.
code: # Example: fixed height with scrollbar singleQuestion(   x = list(     question = "Which ocean is the largest?",     options = c("Atlantic", "Indian", "Pacific", "Arctic"),     answer = 3   ),   scroll = TRUE,   height = "400px" )

title: Demo Files for Documents and Presentations
text: Height: Start "400px" adjust. Slides title need less height full-page slides. Tip/Solution buttons: extra content appears inside scrollable area — need worry overflow. One quiz per slide: best experience, place one quiz per slide. Keyboard navigation: quiz element focused (via Tab), keyboard events stay within quiz. Click outside quiz press Escape return slide navigation. Slidy mouse clicks: Slidy intercepts mouse clicks slide navigation. rquiz handles automatically stopping click propagation inside quiz area. Text formatting: style text within questions (e.g. species names italics function names code), use HTML tags <em>, <strong>, <code>, <span> inline CSS directly question answer option strings. See Creating Quizzes vignette details.

title: Interactive Quizzes as HTML Widgets
text: rquiz provides interactive quizzes HTML widgets R Markdown, Quarto, Shiny applications. offers three quiz types: single question instant feedback (singleQuestion), multi-question quiz navigation, timer, results (multiQuestions), fill---blank cloze exercises (fillBlanks). quizzes support single-choice multiple-choice modes, customizable styling, multilingual UI. developed package Data Science Biology modules University Hamburg, using testing students since 2020 HTML-based lecture slides (see e.g. fill---blank quiz multi-page quiz Data Science 1 course).

code: # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("saskiaotto/rquiz")  # or alternatively # install.packages("pak") pak::install("saskiaotto/rquiz")

title: Create a fill-in-the-blank cloze quiz — fillBlanks
text: x named list containing: $cloze (required) character string full text.           Words phrases become blanks wrapped           $$!answer!$$ markers. $addOptions (optional) character vector additional           (wrong) answer options shown tip area. Use checkFillBlanks validate input passing . title character; title text. set NULL (default), title shown header box. description character; short description title. set NULL (default), language-specific default text used (e.g. "Fill blanks." English, "Fülle die Lücken." German). Set "" (empty string) hide description entirely. language character; language quiz interface. Sets button labels, result text, tips description automatically. Currently supported: "en" (English, default), "de" (German), "fr" (French), "es" (Spanish). request additional languages, please open issue GitHub. showTipButton logical; whether tip button answer options displayed. default FALSE. showSolutionButton logical; whether solution button displayed. default TRUE. width character; width quiz frame area pixels percentage. default "100%". height character; height quiz frame area pixels percentage. default "500px". scroll = FALSE, height automatically determined based content. center logical; TRUE (default), quiz frame centered width less "100%". scroll logical; TRUE, height argument sets fixed frame height scroll bar overflowing content. Useful HTML presentations. FALSE (default), height adjusts automatically. clozeWidth character; width cloze section pixels percentage. default "100%". clozeHeight character NULL; minimum height cloze section. default NULL (auto). Set e.g. "250px" fixed minimum height. blanksWidth character; width blank input fields. default "auto", sizes fields based longest correct answer (minimum 50px). Set fixed value like "150px" NULL browser default. blanksAlign character; alignment text filled blanks. One "center" (default), "left", "right". fontFamily character; font family text elements CSS style. default "'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif". fontSize integer; font size pixels main text elements. properties rescaled accordingly. default 16. titleFontSize integer; font size pixels title. default 20. descriptFontSize integer; font size pixels description. default 16. titleAlign character; alignment title text. One "left" (default), "center", "right". titleCol character; title (description) text color hex color R color name. default "#FFFFFF". titleBg character; title box background color hex color R color name. default "#7E7E7E". questionCol character; description text color. default "#FFFFFF". Named questionCol consistency singleQuestion multiQuestions, parameter controls question container. fillBlanks, controls description container, also provides visual feedback submission (green correct, red errors). questionBg character; background color description container. default "#5F5F5F". mainCol character; text color cloze content area. default "#1C1C1C". mainBg character; background color main content area. default "#F7F7F7". navButtonCol character; submit button text color. default "#FFFFFF". navButtonBg character; submit button background color. default "#28A745". tipButtonCol character; tip button text color. default "#1C1C1C". tipButtonBg character; tip button background color. default "#F1F1F1". solutionButtonCol character; solution button text color. default "#1C1C1C". solutionButtonBg character; solution button background color. default "#F1F1F1". tipAreaCol character; text color tip area. default "#1C1C1C". tipAreaBg character; background color tip answer options area. default "#E7F9E7". tipAreaBorder character; border color tip answer options area. default "#28A745". solutionAreaCol character; text color solution area. default "#1C1C1C". solutionAreaBg character; background color solution area. default "#D6EAF8". Note: fillBlanks, solutions shown directly input fields, parameter reserved future use. solutionAreaBorder character; border color solution area. default "#3498DB". See note solutionAreaBg. theme optional rquizTheme object. Theme values used defaults overridden explicitly passed arguments.

what: Create a multi-page quiz with navigation, timer, and results — multiQuestions
title: Create a multi-page quiz with navigation, timer, and results — multiQuestions
text: multiQuestions creates interactive quiz presents multiple questions one time Previous/Next navigation. timer tracks long user takes (optional), results page shows total score optional 'Show solution' button reveal correct answers. Supports single-choice multiple-choice questions.

title: Create a multi-page quiz with navigation, timer, and results — multiQuestions
code: multiQuestions(   x,   title = "Quiz",   language = "en",   shuffle = FALSE,   showTipButton = FALSE,   showSolutionButton = TRUE,   inclTimer = TRUE,   width = "100%",   height = "500px",   center = TRUE,   scroll = FALSE,   fontFamily = "'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif",   fontSize = 16,   titleFontSize = 20,   questionFontSize = 16,   titleAlign = "left",   titleCol = "#FFFFFF",   titleBg = "#5F5F5F",   questionCol = "#1C1C1C",   questionBg = "#F7F7F7",   mainCol = "#1C1C1C",   mainBg = "#F7F7F7",   optionBg = "#ECECEC",   timerCol = "#1C1C1C",   navButtonCol = "#FFFFFF",   navButtonBg = "#28A745",   tipButtonCol = "#1C1C1C",   tipButtonBg = "#F1F1F1",   tipAreaCol = "#1C1C1C",   tipAreaBg = "#E7F9E7",   tipAreaBorder = "#28A745",   solutionButtonCol = "#1C1C1C",   solutionButtonBg = "#F1F1F1",   solutionAreaCol = "#1C1C1C",   solutionAreaBg = "#D6EAF8",   solutionAreaBorder = "#3498DB",   theme = NULL )

title: Create a multi-page quiz with navigation, timer, and results — multiQuestions
text: x list question lists. sub-list contain: $question character string question text. $options character vector answer options (min. 2). $answer integer index (SC) numeric vector      indices (MC) correct answer option(s). $tip (optional) character string shown custom      tip showTipButton = TRUE. Sub-lists can named (e.g. q1, q2) readability, required. Use checkMultiQuestions validate input passing . title character; title text. default "Quiz". language character; language quiz interface. Sets button labels, navigation text, result page text UI elements automatically. Currently supported: "en" (English, default), "de" (German), "fr" (French), "es" (Spanish). request additional languages, please open issue GitHub. shuffle logical; TRUE, order questions randomized time widget rendered quiz restarted 'Try '. default FALSE. showTipButton logical; whether show tip button question page. TRUE question list contains 4th element (tip text), custom tip displayed. multiple-choice mode without custom tip, number correct answers shown. single-choice mode, button appears questions custom tip. default FALSE. showSolutionButton logical; TRUE (default), 'Show solution' button displayed results page, allowing users reveal correct answers. FALSE, score (0 1) per question shown. inclTimer logical; whether include timer (TRUE, default) . timer starts counting immediately page loaded. width character; width quiz frame area pixels percentage. default "100%". height character; height quiz frame area pixels percentage. default "500px". scroll = FALSE, height automatically determined based content. center logical; TRUE (default), quiz frame centered width less "100%". scroll logical; TRUE, height argument sets fixed frame height scroll bar overflowing content. Useful HTML presentations. FALSE (default), height adjusts automatically. fontFamily character; font family text elements CSS style. default "'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif". fontSize integer; font size pixels main text elements. properties rescaled accordingly. default 16. titleFontSize integer; font size pixels title. default 20. questionFontSize integer; font size pixels question text. default 16. titleAlign character; alignment title text. One "left" (default), "center", "right". titleCol character; title text color hex color R color name. default "#FFFFFF". titleBg character; title background color hex color R color name. default "#5F5F5F". questionCol character; question text color. default "#1C1C1C". question displayed container title answer options. questionBg character; background color question container. default "#F7F7F7". mainCol character; text color answer options main content area. default "#1C1C1C". mainBg character; background color main content area. default "#F7F7F7". optionBg character; background color answer option blocks. hover color automatically derived (30% darker). default "#ECECEC". timerCol character; timer text color hex color R color name. default "#1C1C1C". navButtonCol character; text color navigation buttons (Previous, Next, Try ). default "#FFFFFF". navButtonBg character; background color navigation buttons (Previous, Next, Try ). default "#28A745". tipButtonCol character; tip button text color. default "#1C1C1C". tipButtonBg character; tip button background color. default "#F1F1F1". tipAreaCol character; text color tip area. default "#1C1C1C". tipAreaBg character; background color tip area. default "#E7F9E7". tipAreaBorder character; border color tip area. default "#28A745". solutionButtonCol character; 'Show solution' button text color. default "#1C1C1C". solutionButtonBg character; 'Show solution' button background color. default "#F1F1F1". solutionAreaCol character; text color solution answer areas results page. default "#1C1C1C". solutionAreaBg character; background color solution answer areas results page. default "#D6EAF8". solutionAreaBorder character; border color solution answer areas results page. default "#3498DB". theme optional rquizTheme object. Theme values used defaults overridden explicitly passed arguments.

title: Create a multi-page quiz with navigation, timer, and results — multiQuestions
text: HTML widget object class multiQuestions can   rendered R Markdown/Quarto documents, Shiny applications,   RStudio viewer.

title: Create a multi-page quiz with navigation, timer, and results — multiQuestions
text: quiz mode auto-detected: question multiple correct answers (length(answer) > 1), questions use checkboxes (multiple-choice mode). Otherwise, radio buttons used (single-choice). optional tip button can provide hints per question (custom text , MC mode, number correct answers). Text formatting: Since quiz content rendered HTML, can use HTML tags question option strings: <em> italics (e.g. species names), <strong> bold, <code> inline code, <span> inline CSS colored text. Standard Markdown formatting work inside quiz strings.

what: Create a reusable quiz theme — rquizTheme
title: Create a reusable quiz theme — rquizTheme
text: Defines set design parameters can applied rquiz function (singleQuestion, multiQuestions, fillBlanks). Parameters recognized particular quiz type silently ignored. Explicit values passed directly quiz function always override theme values.

title: Create a reusable quiz theme — rquizTheme
code: rquizTheme(   language = NULL,   shuffle = NULL,   showTipButton = NULL,   showSolutionButton = NULL,   width = NULL,   height = NULL,   center = NULL,   scroll = NULL,   fontFamily = NULL,   fontSize = NULL,   titleFontSize = NULL,   titleAlign = NULL,   titleCol = NULL,   titleBg = NULL,   questionCol = NULL,   questionBg = NULL,   questionFontSize = NULL,   mainCol = NULL,   mainBg = NULL,   optionBg = NULL,   optionLabelBg = NULL,   timerCol = NULL,   navButtonCol = NULL,   navButtonBg = NULL,   tipButtonCol = NULL,   tipButtonBg = NULL,   solutionButtonCol = NULL,   solutionButtonBg = NULL,   tipAreaCol = NULL,   tipAreaBg = NULL,   tipAreaBorder = NULL,   solutionAreaCol = NULL,   solutionAreaBg = NULL,   solutionAreaBorder = NULL,   descriptFontSize = NULL )

title: Create a reusable quiz theme — rquizTheme
text: language character; language UI text ("en", "de", "fr", "es"). shuffle logical; whether randomize options/question order. showTipButton logical; whether show tip button. showSolutionButton logical; whether show solution button. width character; widget width (CSS value). height character; widget height (CSS value). center logical; whether center widget. scroll logical; whether use fixed height scrollbar. fontFamily character; font stack text. fontSize numeric; base font size pixels. titleFontSize numeric; title font size pixels. titleAlign character; title text alignment. titleCol character; title text color. titleBg character; title background color. questionCol character; text color question container (singleQuestion, multiQuestions) description container (fillBlanks). container also provides visual feedback (green/red) singleQuestion fillBlanks. questionBg character; background color question/description container (quiz types). questionFontSize numeric; question font size (singleQuestion, multiQuestions). mainCol character; text color main content area answer options (quiz types). mainBg character; background color main content area (quiz types). optionBg character; background color answer option rows/blocks (singleQuestion, multiQuestions). Hover auto-derived (30% darker). optionLabelBg character; /B/C label background (singleQuestion ). timerCol character; timer text color (multiQuestions ). navButtonCol character; navigation/submit button text color (quiz types). navButtonBg character; navigation/submit button background color (quiz types). tipButtonCol character; tip button text color. tipButtonBg character; tip button background color. solutionButtonCol character; solution button text color. solutionButtonBg character; solution button background color. tipAreaCol character; tip area text color. tipAreaBg character; tip area background color. tipAreaBorder character; tip area border color. solutionAreaCol character; solution area text color. solutionAreaBg character; solution area background color. solutionAreaBorder character; solution area border color. descriptFontSize numeric; description font size (fillBlanks ).

title: Create a single-question quiz (single-choice or multiple-choice) — singleQuestion
text: x list containing 3 4 elements (can named better readability): $question string providing actual question. $options character vector containing answer options. $answer integer indicating correct answer option      (single-choice) numeric vector indices indicating correct      answer options (multiple-choice). quiz mode auto-detected      length field. $tip (optional) string providing custom tip text, shown      showTipButton = TRUE. multiple-choice mode, omitted,      number correct answers shown default tip.      single-choice mode, tip button appears custom tip      provided. Use checkSingleQuestion validate input passing . title character; title text. set NULL (default) header box shown. language character; language quiz interface. Sets button labels, feedback messages UI text automatically. Currently supported: "en" (English, default), "de" (German), "fr" (French), "es" (Spanish). request additional languages, please open issue GitHub. shuffle logical; TRUE, answer options displayed random order time widget rendered. correct answer mapping preserved. default FALSE. showTipButton logical; whether show tip button. TRUE x contains 4th element (e.g. $tip), tip text displayed. multiple-choice mode without custom tip, number correct answers shown default tip. single-choice mode, button shown custom tip text provided x[[4]]. default FALSE. showSolutionButton logical; whether show solution button reveals correct answer(s). default TRUE. width character; width quiz frame area pixels percentage. default "100%". height character; height quiz frame area pixels percentage. default "500px". scroll = FALSE, height automatically determined based content. center logical; TRUE (default), quiz frame centered width less "100%". scroll logical; TRUE, height argument sets fixed frame height scroll bar overflowing content. Useful HTML presentations. FALSE (default), height adjusts automatically. fontFamily character; font family text elements CSS style. default "'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif". fontSize integer; font size pixels answer option text. properties (margins, letter buttons, etc.) rescaled accordingly. default 16. titleFontSize integer; font size pixels title. default 20. questionFontSize integer; font size pixels question text. default 16. titleAlign character; alignment title text. One "left", "center" (default), "right". titleCol character; title text color hex color R color name. default "#FFFFFF". titleBg character; title background color hex color R color name. default "#7E7E7E". questionCol character; question text color hex color R color name. default "white". container also changes color provide visual feedback (green correct, red wrong). questionBg character; question background color hex color R color name. default "#5F5F5F". mainCol character; text color main content area (answer options). default "#1C1C1C". mainBg character; background color main content area. default "#F7F7F7". optionBg character; background color answer option rows. hover color automatically derived (30% darker). default "#ECECEC". optionLabelBg character; background color /B/C/D option labels. hover color automatically derived (20% darker). default "#3498DB". navButtonCol character; navigation/submit button text color. default "#FFFFFF". navButtonBg character; navigation/submit button background color. default "#28A745". tipButtonCol character; tip button text color. default "#1C1C1C". tipButtonBg character; tip button background color. default "#F1F1F1". solutionButtonCol character; solution button text color. default "#1C1C1C". solutionButtonBg character; solution button background color. default "#F1F1F1". tipAreaCol character; text color tip text area. default "#1C1C1C". tipAreaBg character; background color tip text area. default "#E7F9E7". tipAreaBorder character; border color tip text area. default "#28A745". solutionAreaCol character; text color solution text area. default "#1C1C1C". solutionAreaBg character; background color solution text area. default "#D6EAF8". solutionAreaBorder character; border color solution text area. default "#3498DB". theme optional rquizTheme object. Theme values used defaults overridden explicitly passed arguments.

title: Create a single-question quiz (single-choice or multiple-choice) — singleQuestion
text: HTML widget object class singleQuestion can   rendered R Markdown/Quarto documents, Shiny applications,   RStudio viewer.

title: Create a single-question quiz (single-choice or multiple-choice) — singleQuestion
text: single-choice mode, clicking answer option gives immediate visual feedback: green (correct) red (wrong). multiple-choice mode, user selects one options clicks Submit. answer wrong, feedback message indicates many correct wrong selections made. Submit button disabled attempt re-enabled selection changes, allowing user adjust retry. Optional Tip Solution buttons provide additional help. Text formatting: Since quiz content rendered HTML, can use HTML tags question option strings: <em> italics (e.g. species names), <strong> bold, <code> inline code, <span> inline CSS colored text. Standard Markdown formatting work inside quiz strings.

title: rquiz 1.0.0
text: Complete overhaul package, including new features, accessibility improvements, unified design, CRAN-ready packaging. Migrated GitLab (private) GitHub (public) submitted CRAN.

title: rquiz 1.0.0
text: Renamed fillGaps() fillBlanks() consistency “fill---blank” terminology used throughout documentation. Shiny render functions renamed follow camelCase convention: rendersingleQuestion -> renderSingleQuestion, rendermultiQuestions -> renderMultiQuestions, renderFillGaps -> renderFillBlanks. Parameter naming unified across quiz functions: color parameters now use short form (Col/Bg), e.g. titleCol, titleBg, questionCol, questionBg, mainCol, mainBg, optionBg. Renamed submitButtonCol/submitButtonBg navButtonCol/navButtonBg singleQuestion() fillBlanks() consistency multiQuestions(). Removed answersCol, answersBg, hoverBg parameters multiQuestions(). Use mainCol optionBg instead. Hover color now auto-derived (30% darker). convert2JSON() longer exported (internal function ). Default scroll changed FALSE quiz functions. Set scroll = TRUE explicitly HTML slide presentations. Default showSolutionButton changed TRUE quiz functions.

title: rquiz 1.0.0
text: Added multiple-choice support singleQuestion() multiQuestions(). mode auto-detected answer vector. singleQuestion() multiple-choice mode shows Submit, Show tips, Show solution buttons customizable colors. Added shuffle parameter singleQuestion() (shuffles answer options) multiQuestions() (shuffles question order, including “Try ”). Added language parameter quiz functions. Built-support English ("en"), German ("de"), French ("fr"), Spanish ("es"). Translations stored inst/translations.json. Added rquizTheme() creating reusable themes can applied quiz function via theme parameter. Explicit arguments always override theme values. Added input validation functions: checkSingleQuestion(), checkMultiQuestions(), checkFillBlanks(). called internally also exported manual use. Added titleAlign parameter quiz functions. Added mainCol/mainBg parameters singleQuestion() fillBlanks() (already existed multiQuestions()). Added optionBg parameter singleQuestion() styling answer option rows (already existed multiQuestions() answersBg). Added questionCol parameter multiQuestions() independent question text color. Also added questionCol/questionBg fillBlanks() description container. Added questionFontSize parameter singleQuestion(). Added blanksWidth = "auto" mode fillBlanks() automatically sizes input fields based longest correct answer (minimum 50px). Added description parameter fillBlanks() automatic default text based language setting. fillBlanks() description container now provides visual feedback (green/red) submission. multiQuestions() now remembers selected answers navigating back previous questions. Added tip button support multiQuestions() (per-question tips, auto-generated tip MC questions showing number correct answers). Added tip solution button support singleQuestion() single-choice mode.

title: rquiz 1.0.0
text: Added ARIA attributes: role, tabindex, aria-label, aria-checked interactive elements; aria-expanded aria-controls toggle buttons (Tip/Solution). Added keyboard navigation: Tab options buttons, Enter/Space select options, focus management page transitions. Added CSS :focus outlines keyboard users (hidden mouse clicks via :focus-visible). Click event propagation stopped inside quiz widgets prevent conflicts slide frameworks (e.g. slidy).

title: rquiz 1.0.0
text: Removed jQuery dependency: JavaScript code now uses Vanilla JS. eliminates bundled jQuery 3.5.1, jQuery UI, jQuery UI Touch Punch libraries, reducing package size. Replaced fragile paste0()-based JSON generation convert2JSON() jsonlite::toJSON(). Special characters questions (quotes, backslashes) now correctly escaped. Unified HTML structure across three quiz types: consistent class naming (title, question, main, options, buttons), consistent padding, font sizes, container hierarchy. Unified design defaults across three quiz types (consistent colors, button styles, border-radius, responsive layout). Fixed widget scoping: DOM queries now scoped widget container, preventing conflicts multiple quiz widgets appear page. Fixed unscoped CSS selectors affect elements outside quiz (e.g. ioslides presentations). Responsive button layout: buttons wrap next line narrow screens. Added pkgdown website vignette, interactive gallery, demo files Quarto, Slidy, RevealJS. Changed license CC 4.0 MIT CRAN compatibility. Migrated repository GitLab GitHub (https://github.com/saskiaotto/rquiz).

title: rquiz 0.3.0
text: Removed dragAndDrop() due persistent touch/interaction issues tablets slide presentations. Added fillGaps() replacement: fill---blank cloze quiz users type answers input fields instead dragging items.

title: rquiz 0.2.0
text: Added dragAndDrop(): cloze drag--drop quiz users drag answer options blank fields text.

title: rquiz 0.1.0
text: singleQuestion(): Single-choice quiz immediate feedback. multiQuestions(): Multi-page quiz timer results page. Built mix vanilla JavaScript jQuery/jQuery UI. Used Data Science lectures University Hamburg since 2020.
